topic: ACL main Figure 4 stack-entry caption polish

before_text_matches: page 9 line 003: arrows, with overlay color changed for readability; green reference paths. Quantitative embodied-data
page 9 line 004: claims remain tied to the 99-episode paired run and official-scene load/render checks.
defect.reader_effect: The Figure 4 caption still used embodied-data terminology after the main paper narrowed the InternNav evidence to stack-entry claims.

changes.summary: Changed the Figure 4 caption phrase from Quantitative embodied-data claims to Quantitative stack-entry claims.

rejected_iterations.summary: Attempted to rewrite the page-1 italic research question from embodied-data claims to stack-oriented wording.
rejected_iterations.reason_rejected: Four variants introduced worse visible line breaks, including stack-/entry, con-/verted, an-/swer, and re-/liability. The accepted PDF leaves page 1 unchanged.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 9 extracted text now shows Quantitative stack-entry claims in the Figure 4 caption.
after_evidence.visual_result: The accepted page-9 screenshot keeps the caption at four lines with no new visible hyphenation or overlap.

claim_boundary: Visible Figure 4 caption terminology only. No metrics, evidence pools, figures, tables, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: Page 1 still contains the older embodied-data phrase because accepted alternatives caused worse narrow-column line flow; it remains a possible future target only with a different paragraph-level reflow.
